Field.name: lots_dropped_order
Field.Description: Determines the order lots are granted.

Field.name: lots_dropped_num
Field.Description: Number of lots this itemLot will provide.

Field.name: amount_lot_0
Field.Description: Determines the amount of the lot item awarded.

Field.name: amount_lot_1
Field.Description: Determines the amount of the lot item awarded.

Field.Description: Determines the amount of the lot item awarded.

Field.Description: Determines the amount of the lot item awarded.

Field.Description: Determines the amount of the lot item awarded.

Field.Description: Determines the amount of the lot item awarded.

Field.Description: Determines the amount of the lot item awarded.

Field.name: amount_lot_7
Field.Description: Determines the amount of the lot item awarded.

Field.name: amount_lot_8
Field.Description: Determines the amount of the lot item awarded.

Field.name: amount_lot_9
Field.Description: Determines the amount of the lot item awarded.

Field.name: reinforcement_lot_0
Field.Description: The reinforcement level to apply to the lot item

Field.Description: The reinforcement level to apply to the lot item

Field.name: infusion_lot_0
Field.Description: The infusion to apply to the lot item

Field.name: infinite_lot_0
Field.Description: Determines if this item may continue to drop after dropping once.

Field.name: infinite_lot_1
Field.Description: Determines if this item may continue to drop after dropping once.

Field.name: infinite_lot_2
Field.Description: Determines if this item may continue to drop after dropping once.

Field.name: infinite_lot_3
Field.Description: Determines if this item may continue to drop after dropping once.

Field.name: infinite_lot_4
Field.Description: Determines if this item may continue to drop after dropping once.

Field.Description: Determines if this item may continue to drop after dropping once.

Field.Description: Determines if this item may continue to drop after dropping once.

Field.Description: Determines if this item may continue to drop after dropping once.

Field.Description: Determines if this item may continue to drop after dropping once.

Field.name: infinite_lot_9
Field.Description: Determines if this item may continue to drop after dropping once.

Field.name: chance_lot_0
Field.Description: The base percentage for this item.\nEach base percentage is added together, the result is the overall chance for an item to drop for the itemlot.\nThen during a second roll, the individual percentages are used to determine which item to drop.

Field.name: chance_lot_1
Field.Description: The base percentage for this item.\nEach base percentage is added together, the result is the overall chance for an item to drop for the itemlot.\nThen during a second roll, the individual percentages are used to determine which item to drop.

Field.name: chance_lot_2
Field.Description: The base percentage for this item.\nEach base percentage is added together, the result is the overall chance for an item to drop for the itemlot.\nThen during a second roll, the individual percentages are used to determine which item to drop.

Field.name: chance_lot_3
Field.Description: The base percentage for this item.\nEach base percentage is added together, the result is the overall chance for an item to drop for the itemlot.\nThen during a second roll, the individual percentages are used to determine which item to drop.

Field.name: chance_lot_4
Field.Description: The base percentage for this item.\nEach base percentage is added together, the result is the overall chance for an item to drop for the itemlot.\nThen during a second roll, the individual percentages are used to determine which item to drop.

Field.name: chance_lot_5
Field.Description: The base percentage for this item.\nEach base percentage is added together, the result is the overall chance for an item to drop for the itemlot.\nThen during a second roll, the individual percentages are used to determine which item to drop.

Field.name: chance_lot_6
Field.Description: The base percentage for this item.\nEach base percentage is added together, the result is the overall chance for an item to drop for the itemlot.\nThen during a second roll, the individual percentages are used to determine which item to drop.

Field.Description: The base percentage for this item.\nEach base percentage is added together, the result is the overall chance for an item to drop for the itemlot.\nThen during a second roll, the individual percentages are used to determine which item to drop.

Field.name: chance_lot_8
Field.Description: The base percentage for this item.\nEach base percentage is added together, the result is the overall chance for an item to drop for the itemlot.\nThen during a second roll, the individual percentages are used to determine which item to drop.

Field.name: chance_lot_9
Field.Description: The base percentage for this item.\nEach base percentage is added together, the result is the overall chance for an item to drop for the itemlot.\nThen during a second roll, the individual percentages are used to determine which item to drop.
